title: Necromancer summons from cemetery as a Limited Summon

card.rawText: During your turn, you may summon 1 creature from your cemetery as a Limited Summon (MAX-1). Return the summoned creature to your cemetery if this card leaves the field, changes control, or this effect is negated.

plan.title: Necromancer summons from cemetery as a Limited Summon
plan.summary: During player_1's turn, activate Necromancer, choose a creature from player_1 cemetery, and verify it enters the field as a Limited Summon.

notes: Place Necromancer on player_1 field as primary.
Put a creature in player_1 cemetery before activation.

steps: Choose the cemetery creature as the Limited Summon target.
Inspect player_1 field creatures and cemetery.
manualVerification: Confirm the MAX-1 Limited Summon cap blocks a second Necromancer summon.
riskNotes: This covers the successful cemetery Limited Summon branch. Source invalidation cleanup is covered by 076-E02.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
